title: Fajita Chicken Casserole (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Fajita Chicken Casserole is a protein-forward baked dinner with juicy chicken, colorful peppers, and bold fajita seasoning. It is perfect for weeknight cooking and batch-friendly meal prep.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Chicken
- Bell peppers
- Onion
- Fajita spices (cumin, chili powder, paprika)
- Garlic (optional)
- Mozzarella (or a similar cheese)
- Optional: black beans
- Salt, pepper, and olive oil

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Preheat oven to 375F (190C).
2. Season and cook chicken briefly in a skillet to develop flavor.
3. Saute peppers and onion until slightly tender.
4. Layer chicken, peppers/onion, and cheese in a baking dish; bake until bubbly.
5. Serve and log your serving size in Eati for accurate macros.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 363 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 13g
Protein: 49g

Tip: keep toppings light to preserve a lower-fat macro profile.

conclusion: A simple casserole that makes it easy to eat more protein without feeling like you are sacrificing flavor. Track it in Eati and repeat what works.
